desc: A calendar inset into the desktop
doc:
A calendar inset into the desktop with Chinese holiday display

Download: [https://github.com/Hammerspoon/Spoons/raw/master/Spoons/Calendar.spoon.zip](https://github.com/Hammerspoon/Spoons/raw/master/Spoons/Calendar.spoon.zip)

Holidays: Shows Chinese public holidays with warm orange-red color.
Data fetched from holiday.ailcc.com API with embedded fallback.
name: Calendar

doc:
Chinese holiday data module for DaxCalendar.
Fetches from holiday.ailcc.com API, falls back to embedded data.
Provides holiday lookup by (year, month, day).

items.name: fetchYear
items.desc: Fetch holiday data from remote API for a given year
items.doc: Fetch holiday data from remote API for a given year

items.name: isHoliday
items.desc: Check if a date is a holiday. Returns (true, {name, abbr}) or (false, nil)
items.doc: Check if a date is a holiday. Returns (true, {name, abbr}) or (false, nil)

items.name: monthHolidays
items.desc: Get a table of holidays for a specific (year, month)
items.doc: Get a table of holidays for a specific (year, month)

items.name: holidayColor
items.desc: Returns color table for holiday text (#FF6B35 warm orange-red)
items.doc: Returns color table for holiday text (#FF6B35 warm orange-red)

name: Holidays
